title: 商汤科技与国星宇航共建「商汤算力星座」——太空算力基础设施产业深度分析：从地面万卡集群到在轨多星协同，AI基础设施的「天地一体」新纪元
title_en: SenseTime and Guoxing Aerospace Build the 'SenseTime Computing Constellation'—Deep Industry Analysis of Space Computing Infrastructure: From Ground ExaFLOPS Clusters to In-Orbit Multi-Satellite Collaboration, the 'Space-Earth Integrated' New Era of AI Infrastructure
subtitle: WAIC 2026 上商汤与国星宇航宣布千星万P太空算力星座计划，上海「星枢计划」首发星座发布，优刻得太空算力样机亮相。从 SpaceX Starmind 到商汤星座，中美太空算力路线首次正面交锋。本文深度拆解太空算力的技术路径、产业逻辑与投资图谱。
subtitle_en: At WAIC 2026, SenseTime and Guoxing Aerospace announced a thousand-satellite ExaFLOPS space computing constellation. Shanghai's 'Star Pivot Plan' debut constellation launched. From SpaceX Starmind to SenseTime Constellation—Sino-US space computing roadmaps intersect for the first time. Deep analysis of technology paths, industry logic, and investment landscape.
summary: WAIC 2026 第三天，商汤科技与国星宇航宣布共建「商汤算力星座」，目标千星万P。同日上海「星枢计划」首发星座发布、优刻得太空算力样机亮相。本文从产业视角深度拆解太空算力的技术路径、中美路线对比、产业意义与投资图谱，揭示AI基础设施从地面万卡集群迈向在轨多星协同的「天地一体」新纪元。
summary_en: On Day 3 of WAIC 2026, SenseTime and Guoxing Aerospace announced the 'SenseTime Computing Constellation' targeting 1,000 satellites with 1+ ExaFLOPS. Same day saw Shanghai's 'Star Pivot Plan' debut and UCloud's space computing prototype. This article deeply analyzes the technology paths, Sino-US roadmap comparison, industrial significance, and investment landscape of the new 'space-earth integrated' era of AI infrastructure.
author: AI News Daily
source: AI News Daily 综合报道
